title: crataegus brainerdii var. asperifolia
intro: Crataegus brainerdii var. asperifolia, also known as the Roughleaf Hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus brainerdii var. asperifolia include lowering blood pressure, improving circulation, and reducing the risk of heart disease. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote cardiovascular health and well-being.
